summary: PI Terms & Conditions feature testing completed. All 13 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - Terms textarea with default terms pre-filled, helper text, Reset button functionality all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: PICreate model accepts terms_and_conditions field (line 200 in server.py)
DEFAULT_PI_TERMS constant defined with 7 default terms (line 202-210)
PDF generation uses custom terms if set, otherwise defaults (lines 3095-3128)
Both GST and Non-GST PI PDFs share same terms rendering code
Frontend DEFAULT_TERMS constant matches backend DEFAULT_PI_TERMS
Terms textarea pre-filled with defaults, shows helper text
Reset to Default button appears only when terms are modified
Reset button clears termsAndConditions state to empty string (uses defaults)

features_verified.backend_pi_create_without_terms: PASS - PI created without terms stores empty string (defaults used in PDF)
features_verified.backend_gst_pi_with_terms: PASS - GST PI created with custom terms
features_verified.backend_pdf_default_terms: PASS - PDF generated with default terms when no custom terms set
features_verified.backend_pdf_custom_terms: PASS - PDF generated with custom terms when set
features_verified.backend_gst_pdf_with_terms: PASS - GST PI PDF generated with terms section
features_verified.backend_existing_non_gst_pi: PASS - Existing Non-GST PI (0242f1c9-3882-447d-9a3d-4cfd7a1dba71) returns terms field
features_verified.backend_existing_gst_pi: PASS - Existing GST PI (d9441f44-830f-4ffc-9c9d-9a50d5431ff2) returns terms field
features_verified.backend_empty_terms_uses_defaults: PASS - Empty terms_and_conditions uses defaults in PDF
features_verified.backend_reset_terms_to_empty: PASS - Terms can be reset to empty (use defaults)
features_verified.frontend_pi_builder_page_loads: PASS - /proforma page loads with PI list
features_verified.frontend_create_pi_button: PASS - 'New PI' button opens PI form
features_verified.frontend_terms_textarea_exists: PASS - Terms & Conditions textarea found with data-testid='terms-textarea'
features_verified.frontend_terms_prefilled_defaults: PASS - Textarea pre-filled with 7 default terms (503 chars)
features_verified.frontend_default_terms_content: PASS - Contains 'Goods once sold', 'Nagpur jurisdiction', '2-3 working days'
features_verified.frontend_helper_text_default: PASS - Shows 'Default terms. Edit to override for this PI only.'
features_verified.frontend_reset_button_hidden: PASS - Reset button not visible when using default terms
features_verified.frontend_reset_button_appears: PASS - Reset to Default button appears after modifying terms
features_verified.frontend_reset_button_works: PASS - Clicking Reset restores default terms
features_verified.frontend_edit_pi_loads_terms: PASS - Editing existing PI loads terms in textarea

seed_data_creation: Created TEST_PI_TERMS Customer with unique phone number for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: PI Terms & Conditions feature fully tested and working. Backend stores terms_and_conditions field in proforma_invoices collection. If empty/blank, PDF uses DEFAULT_PI_TERMS (7 terms). If set, PDF splits by newlines and shows custom terms only. Frontend shows textarea pre-filled with DEFAULT_TERMS constant. When user edits, termsAndConditions state becomes truthy. Reset button clears it back to empty string. Both GST and Non-GST PI PDFs share the same terms rendering code in server.py lines 3092-3128.
